channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Republican and Democratic House Latinos face off in race to increase their numbers
item.description: Latino House Republicans are building out campaign infrastructure to protect their members and grow their numbers, at times directly competing with their Democratic counterparts, who have a huge head start. Rep.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, NewsNation

item.title: Hospital that delayed emergency abortion bears blame for Georgia woman’s death, family’s lawyer claims
item.description: High-profile civil rights attorney Ben Crump said Georgia woman Amber Thurman's death was due to hospital staff delaying providing her care, as Democrats blame the state's law.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former law enforcement officers, military vets step up to save stranded hurricane survivors without FEMA
item.description: A group of civilians has banded together to help with disaster relief in North Carolina in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene, which devastated several areas of the state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republican NY-18 candidate Alison Esposito says America doesn’t have a gun problem
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Alison Esposito, a Republican candidate running for Congress in New York’s 18th District, said she does not support a ban on assault weapons and that America doesn’t have a gun problem. Esposito made the comments during a debate against Democratic U.S. Rep.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: Harris faces new urgency to explain how her potential presidency would be different from Biden's
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris is facing new urgency to define how her potential presidency would be different from President Joe Biden's.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ryan Hamilton discusses homelessness, the Animal Foundation, and F1
item.description: Ryan Hamilton, a Republican candidate for the Clark County Commission, appeared on 8 News Now's Daily Voting Guide to share his perspective on homelessness, animal welfare, and Formula One's impact on the local economy as the election nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito face off in NY-18 debate on PIX11
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic U.S. Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican Alison Esposito, the two candidates running to represent New York's 18th Congressional District, faced off in a debate on PIX11 Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: House Democrats' campaign chief defends vulnerable members keeping distance from Harris
item.description: NEW YORK — Rep. Suzan DelBene (D-Wash.), the House Democrats’ campaign chief, is defending vulnerable lawmakers who have kept their distance from Vice President Harris while campaigning.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump's 'God Bless the USA' Bibles printed in China, records show
item.description: Trump started selling the "God Bless the USA" Bibles in partnership with country musician Lee Greenwood earlier this year.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Trump-Putin ties are back in the spotlight after new book describes calls
item.description: A new book's assertion that former President Donald Trump may have had as many as seven private phone calls with Russian President Vladimir Putin since leaving the White House has refocused attention on their politically fraught relationship and on Trump's sustained dialogue with world leaders as he
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump foe Mitt Romney resists endorsing Harris
item.description: Utah Republican Sen. Mitt Romney indicated he won't break with the GOP and endorse Vice President Harris, despite his outspoken criticisms of former President Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris risks losing crucial battleground state due to Biden's gas export pause, as Dems plead to change course
item.description: Kamala Harris is facing a growing chorus of bipartisan pressure to undo Biden's LNG pause ahead of Election Day, or risk her chances in the must-win swing state of Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vance’s Midwestern roots appeal to Michigan swing-county voters despite Buckeye ties
item.description: Ohio Sen. JD Vance can help former President Donald Trump win Michigan thanks to his Midwestern upbringing, which will appeal to voters in the critical swing state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kremlin confirms Trump sent COVID tests to Putin during pandemic
item.description: “We also sent equipment at the beginning of the pandemic,” Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said. “But about the phone calls — it’s not true.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: Trump Florida resort hosts linemen before Hurricane Milton response
item.description: The Trump Organization extended an invitation to more than 200 power linemen to stay at their golf resort in Miami Wednesday, as Florida's Gulf Coast prepares for Hurricane Milton to make landfall this week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Sen. Tim Johnson, the last Democrat to hold statewide office in South Dakota, dies at 77
item.description: Former Sen. Tim Johnson, a centrist who was the last Democrat to hold statewide office in South Dakota and who spent nearly three decades in Congress, has died.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Military board substantiates misconduct but declines to fire Marine who adopted Afghan orphan
item.description: CAMP LEJEUNE, N.C. (AP) — A U.S. Marine whose adoption of an Afghan war orphan has spurred a yearslong legal battle and raised alarms at the highest levels of government will remain on active duty. A three-member panel of Marines said Tuesday that while Maj.
item.dc:creator: JULIET LINDERMAN, CLAIRE GALOFARO and MARTHA MENDOZA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fight to control NJ child care costs continues
item.description: HACKENSACK, N.J. (PIX11) - Elizabeth Velazquez is a mother to three, two of whom go to Little Learners Child Development Center in Hackensack. "My children mean the world to me," she said, holding back tears, "and I want to be able to continue to work hard every day to provide the world to them.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: How Hurricane Helene may affect the election in North Carolina
item.description: None of the 13 affected counties in North Carolina have a fully operational elections board, according to the state's Secretary of State office.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Cruz opponent Allred raises $30 million in 3 months
item.description: Rep. Colin Allred (D-Texas) announced Tuesday that he has raised more than $30 million over the past three months in his battle against incumbent Texas Sen. Ted Cruz (R), reflecting broad desire among Democratic donors to defeat one of the Senate’s most prominent conservatives.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Harris proposes expanding Medicare to cover in-home senior care
item.description: Appearing Tuesday on ABC's “The View,” Harris talked about taking care of her mother when she was dying and personally experiencing the challenges many families face when seeking affordable in-home care for their aging loved ones.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's shifting abortion stance raises questions for evangelical support
item.description: Former President Trump’s softening stance on reproductive health has raised questions about his standing with white evangelical voters, a key part of his coalition dating back to 2016.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: When was the last time New York voted red?
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - New York has been a blue state since the U.S. began labeling states red or blue back in 2000 (more on that later).
item.dc:creator: Nick Jachim, PIX 11

item.title: Harris pressed on changing positions, economic plan in '60 Minutes' interview
item.description: Vice President Harris was pressed on her changing policy positions and her expensive economic plan on “60 Minutes,” in what proved to be her toughest media interview since becoming the Democratic nominee.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: October surprise 'huge myth,' Harris will win: Allan Lichtman
item.description: The "October surprise" is a "huge myth" in American politics, according to the historian who devised the “Keys to the White House” formula.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Can someone find out who you voted for? No. Here is what you should know
item.description: As Election Day approaches, many Americans are questioning the secrecy of their ballots. We explain what you should know about privacy and casting a ballot.
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster, MPR News

item.title: Trump is returning to Butler, the site of the 1st assassination attempt against him
item.description: The rally will mark Trump's first time back in the Pennsylvania city since the failed assassination attempt against him in July. The guest list will include a shooting survivor, as well as Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Kurtzleben, MPR News

item.title: Obama to campaign for Harris in key swing states, starting with Pennsylvania
item.description: Former President Obama is set to hit the campaign trail for Vice President Harris this month, starting his blitz in the key battleground state of Pennsylvania next week.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Gloria, Turner compete in San Diego mayoral race debate
item.description: The debate between San Diego Mayor Todd Gloria and police officer and challenger Larry Turner covered a wide range of issues from transportation, flood infrastructure failures, housing shortages and of course homelessness.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: Melania Trump says she supports abortion rights, putting her at odds with the GOP
item.description: Melania Trump has revealed her support for abortion rights ahead of the release of her upcoming memoir. Her stated position exposes a stark contrast with her husband, Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump, on the crucial election issue.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO, WFLA, NBC
